---
title: "References"
---

## Papers introducing the method

- Moka, S., Liquet, B., Zhu, H. and Muller, S. (2024).
  *COMBSS: best subset selection via continuous optimization.*
  **Statistics and Computing** 34, 75.
  [doi:10.1007/s11222-024-10387-8](https://doi.org/10.1007/s11222-024-10387-8){target="_blank"}

- Mathur, A., Liquet, B., Muller, S. and Moka, S. (2026).
  *Parsimonious Subset Selection for Generalized Linear Models with Biomedical Applications.*
  **arXiv preprint** [arXiv:2603.21952](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.21952){target="_blank"}.

## COMBSS extensions

- Mathur, A., Moka, S. and Botev, Z. (2023).
  *Column Subset Selection and Nyström Approximation via Continuous Optimization.*
  **Proceedings of the 2023 Winter Simulation Conference (WSC)**, 3601–3612.
  [arXiv:2304.09678](https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.09678){target="_blank"}.

- Liquet, B., Moka, S. and Muller, S. (2025).
  *Best subset solution path for linear dimension reduction models using continuous optimization* (sparse PCA and sparse PLS).
  **Biometrical Journal** 67 (1), e70015.
  [arXiv:2403.20007](https://arxiv.org/abs/2403.20007){target="_blank"}.

- Mathur, A., Moka, S., Liquet, B. and Botev, Z. (2024).
  *Group COMBSS: group selection via continuous optimization.*
  **2024 Winter Simulation Conference (WSC)**, IEEE, 3217–3228.
  [arXiv:2404.13339](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.13339){target="_blank"}.

- Reimann, H., Moka, S. and Sofronov, G. (2024).
  *Continuous Optimization for Offline Change Point Detection and Estimation.*
  **Proceedings of the 2024 Winter Simulation Conference (WSC)**.

- Moka, S., Quiroz, M., Asimit, V. and Muller, S. (2025).
  *A Scalable Gradient-Based Optimization Framework for Sparse Minimum-Variance Portfolio Selection.*
  **arXiv preprint** [arXiv:2505.10099](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.10099){target="_blank"}.

## Software

- **R** — `combss` on CRAN — [package page](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/combss/index.html){target="_blank"}
- **Python** — `combss` on PyPI — [package page](https://pypi.org/project/combss/){target="_blank"}
- Source for this presentation — [github.com/saratmoka/combss-statfest](https://github.com/saratmoka/combss-statfest){target="_blank"}

## Datasets used in this presentation

- **Khan SRBCT.** Khan, J. et al. (2001). *Classification and diagnostic prediction of cancers using gene expression profiling and artificial neural networks.* **Nature Medicine** 7, 673–679. [link](https://www.nature.com/articles/nm0601_673){target="_blank"}
- **Rice GWAS.** McCouch, S. R. et al. (2016). *Open access resources for genome-wide association mapping in rice.* **Nature Communications** 7, 10532. [link](https://www.nature.com/articles/ncomms10532){target="_blank"}

## Related methods cited

- **Lasso.** Tibshirani, R. (1996). *Regression shrinkage and selection via the Lasso.* **Journal of the Royal Statistical Society, Series B** 58 (1), 267–288.
- **MIO best subset.** Bertsimas, D., King, A. and Mazumder, R. (2016). *Best subset selection via a modern optimization lens.* **Annals of Statistics** 44 (2), 813–852.
- **SCAD.** Fan, J. and Li, R. (2001). *Variable selection via nonconcave penalized likelihood and its oracle properties.* **Journal of the American Statistical Association** 96 (456), 1348–1360.
- **MCP.** Zhang, C.-H. (2010). *Nearly unbiased variable selection under minimax concave penalty.* **Annals of Statistics** 38 (2), 894–942.

## Acknowledgements

The R package is maintained by Benoit Liquet; the Python package is maintained by Sarat Moka. Anant Mathur contributed to the development of both.

::: {.page-nav}
[← Previous: What's next](whats-next.qmd)

<span class="nav-spacer"></span>
:::
